actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Inner rooms are fortified. Executors are holding the choke points.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Break the stronghold and find the source of their command signal.

SECURITY POST
Staff rotation suspended.
Any report of ritual language is to be escalated, not logged locally.

actions.speaker: OPS
actions.text: Stronghold is down. Something in the facility wanted time, not victory.
